name: SEAFARER EXPLORATION CORP
business: Seafarer Exploration Corp. is a Florida corporation whose principal business plan is to develop infrastructure to engage in rescue archaeology, exploration, recovery and conservation of historic shipwrecks, and to eventually monetize the recovery of artifacts. The company has generated only minimal revenue and expects to continue incurring operating losses. It develops proprietary technology, including the SeaSearcher device, to discriminate between metals for shipwreck recovery.

exposures.sentence: The Company s principal business plan is to develop the infrastructure to engage in rescue archaeology, archaeologically-sensitive exploration and research, recovery and conservation of historic shipwrecks and to eventually monetize the recovery of artifacts.

tamClaims.claim: It has been estimated by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization ( UNESCO ) that there are over three million undiscovered shipwrecks around the world
tamClaims.sentence: It has been estimated by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization ( UNESCO ) that there are over three million undiscovered shipwrecks around the world and some of these shipwrecks were lost with verifiable cargoes that contained valuable materials, including artifacts and treasure.
